role_summary: Architectural specification defining the integration contracts, component boundaries, and sequential data flow for an automated repository analysis and documentation generation pipeline.
finding: The system operates as a modular, orchestrator-driven pipeline that transforms raw repository artifacts into structured documentation and AI-synthesized derivatives. It enforces strict separation of concerns by isolating core analysis logic behind standardized contracts for external dependencies (AI providers, configuration, telemetry), enabling provider swapability and independent component evolution. The specification explicitly acknowledges missing operational contracts for error handling, data serialization, and security, indicating it serves as a high-level integration blueprint rather than a production-ready implementation guide.
